evidence: Scope: exactly 3 files changed (reference-mcp/README.md, reference-mcp/state.mjs, tests/reference_mcp.test.mjs), working tree clean.
15 tools: test at reference_mcp.test.mjs:347-364 enumerates all 15 tools covering requiredTools + optionalTools from target profile; schema-exact success for each verified.
No business data simulated: _meta.simulated=true only in response envelope (server.mjs:43), never in business payload fields. Test at line 291 confirms 'without business simulation markers'.
Closed-world state: state_version monotonically increments (5→6→7→8) with derived allowed_actions (test lines 477-528). Unknown phases fail closed with INVALID_PHASE error (line 524).

Recovery: enforces strict refresh→request→finalize order. refresh_recovery idempotent (lines 517-518). request_recovery triggers ingest→recovering state. Each trigger produces exactly one recovery operation (state.mjs:893,916).
Send binding: distribution response returns selection_result_id matching the state's selection identity, plus send_operation_id (test lines 497-508).

Frozen artifacts: mutation of caller objects not reflected in repeated reads (line 603-626). No offer promotion evidence — get_creator_detail with include_offers:true returns no offers key (line 632-635). RAW_MESSAGES content not leaked into snapshot (line 636).
Network isolation: test mock rejects all fetch calls (line 298), networkCalls assertion is 0 (line 369).
Forbidden paths: no edits to dist/, packages/.staging/, scripts/, or any non-task files. diff --stat confirms only 3 owned files.
known_risks: Simulator remains in-memory; cannot prove production database CAS, provider correlation, cron delivery, late-data constraints, or offer promotion deployment.
